title: Limitations of Yosys Diagram Generation
body:
Does yosys have a limitation in terms of viewing the circuit diagram representation of your design module. I am getting the following messages.

```
=== mult ===

   Number of wires:               9015
   Number of wire bits:           9299
   Number of public wires:           4
   Number of public wire bits:     288
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:               9139
     SB_LUT4                      9139

9.13. Executing CHECK pass (checking for obvious problems).
checking module mult..
found and reported 0 problems.

yosys> show

10. Generating Graphviz representation of design.
Writing dot description to `/home/***/.yosys_show.dot'.
Dumping module mult to page 1.
Exec: { test -f '/home/***/.yosys_show.dot.pid' && fuser -s '/home/***/.yosys_show.dot.pid'; } || ( echo $$ >&3; exec xdot '/home/***/.yosys_show.dot'; ) 3> '/home/***/.yosys_show.dot.pid' &
```
The code for the design module  is
```
module mult #(parameter i_width=64, o_width=128)(input logic[i_width-1:0] multiplier, multiplicand, output logic [o_width-1:0] product ); 
 integer i; 
 always @(*) 
 begin 
 product = 1'b0; 
 for(i=0; i<i_width; i=i+1) begin 
 if(multiplicand [i] == 1'b1) 
 begin 
 product = product + (multiplier << (i)); 
 end 
 end 
 end 
 endmodule
```
